# Solobase

> Open-source backend in a single binary — auth, database, file storage,
> admin panel, LLM/RAG, and payments. Runs on Linux, macOS, Windows, in
> the browser via WebAssembly, or on Cloudflare Workers. Built on the
> WAFER block runtime; extend with sandboxed WASM blocks.

## Start here

- [SKILL.md](https://solobase.dev/SKILL.md): Operating manual for AI
  agents — install, run, discover blocks, write extensions, verify.
- [Documentation (markdown)](https://solobase.dev/docs/index.md): Full
  docs as raw markdown — quick start, configuration, CLI, deploy
  targets, custom blocks.
- [Documentation (HTML)](https://solobase.dev/docs/): Same content
  rendered for humans.

## About the project

- [Why Solobase](https://solobase.dev/why/): Origin story, design
  rationale, AI-friendly properties.
- [Notes / honest disclaimer](https://solobase.dev/notes/): What works,
  what doesn't, current production-readiness.
- [Homepage](https://solobase.dev/): Feature overview and demo.

## Source and community

- [GitHub repo](https://github.com/suppers-ai/solobase): Source code,
  issues, releases.
- [Latest release](https://github.com/suppers-ai/solobase/releases/latest):
  Download binaries for Linux, macOS, Windows.
- [Discord](https://discord.gg/jKqMcbrVzm): Community chat.

## Optional

- [Demo instance](https://demo.solobase.dev): Read-only live admin panel.
